title: senegalia pennata var. heyneana
intro: Senegalia pennata var. heyneana, also known as the Heyne's tree or Neem tree, is a small to medium-sized deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senegalia pennata var. heyneana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide protection against various diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into a paste or powder and used topically or taken orally in the form of a decoction or infusion.
